---
title: "Rise of Analytics"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../assets/reveal.scss]
    css: ../assets/frankfurt.css
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    lazy-load: true
    slide-number: true
    auto-stretch: false
    slide-level: 2
    center: false
    section-divs: true
    scale: 0.67
    chalkboard:
      theme: whiteboard
      boardmarker-width: 5
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
---

{{< include _rise_of_analytics.qmd >}}
